---
title: "Carsen Stringer"
title-block-banner: true
sidebar: false
toc: true
about:
  template: marquee
---

<center>
<img src="images/stringerc.jpg" width="200px" class="responsive"></img><br>
</center>
<br>

Carsen Stringer is a group leader at HHMI Janelia Research Campus. The lab develops algorithms for understanding large-scale neural activity. In addition, the lab works on general segmentation algorithms for cellular data, which enable fast and accurate processing of ~50,000 neuron recordings.

<a href="cvs/stringer.pdf"><span style="font-size: 1.2em;">CV</span></a><br>
<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=6v9BmeYAAAAJ&hl=en"><i class="bi bi-google"></i> google scholar</a><br> 
<a href="https://github.com/carsen-stringer"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> carsen-stringer</a><br> 
<a href="https://bsky.app/profile/computingnature.bsky.social"><i class="bi bi-bluesky"></i> computingnature</a><br>
